name: oculusgo
description: Streamer Version for Oculus Go & GearVR Users

blocks.text: Streamer Version for Oculus Go & GearVR

If you're using Oculus Go or GearVR, you need to use version 1.20.38 of the Streamer. This is the last version that is compatible with these devices. You can download it from [here](https://download.vrdesktop.net/files/go/VirtualDesktop.Streamer.Setup.exe).
